title: The Happy 'PE'ople
author: Sam Goodman
description: Welcome to The Happy 'PE'ople podcast where you can listen to stories and general conversation about sport, shared by members of staff at Barnwell School. Guests will share where their love of sport came from, what motivates them to take part and any inspirational advice that can be shared to our listeners. Hopefully somewhere along the way you will laugh, smile and be inspired whilst leaving at the end feeling 'happy'.
